banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: an individual selling a private car to another individual within the same RTO jurisdiction, with no financing/hire-purchase agreement on the vehicle. All names, the registration mark, the chassis number, and addresses below are fabricated test data, not a real vehicle or identity record.

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: vehicleUnderHirePurchaseLeaseOrHypothecation is false, so this requiredWhen field does not apply for this mock filer.

branchNotExercised.reasoning: Not exercised with a full mock value set in this packet. Reasoned through against the schema instead: financierName becomes required (schema requiredWhen), and the documents[].financierConsentAndSpecimenSignature attestation becomes required (schema requiredWhen on the same field/value), matching Form 30's financier-consent block and specimen-signature instruction. No schema constraint conflict was found in tracing this branch.

attestation: documents[].transferFee — a mock-scenario note only; no payment was made or attempted, since this schema does not submit the notification. documents[].certificateOfRegistration, certificateOfInsurance, and transfereeProofOfAddress are noted as the fabricated filer's supporting documents, not attached as files in this JSON packet.
safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (in/morth/vehicle-ownership-transfer). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to any RTO, Parivahan, VAHAN, or other government system, and every name, registration mark, chassis number, and address above is a fabricated example, not a real record — the live Parivahan/VAHAN 'Transfer of Ownership' e-service is a state-instanced, login-gated transactional portal with no public test/sandbox mode, so this schema's author did not attempt to exercise a live wizard end to end (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the transferor and transferee) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through the applicant's own RTO or its state's Parivahan/VAHAN portal before this transfer is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
